scripts.dev: concurrently "bun run --cwd node-gateway dev" "cd fastapi-brain && uv run uvicorn app.main:app --reload --port 8000"
scripts.test: bun run --cwd node-gateway test && cd fastapi-brain && uv run pytest
scripts.db:generate: bunx prisma generate --generator client && cd fastapi-brain && uv run prisma generate --schema ../prisma/schema.prisma
